description: Year-round program promoting amateur radio operation from mountain summits

summit_to_summit.note: S2S contacts count bonus points equal to the other summit's point value

rulesConfig.notes: Activators must make minimum 4 QSOs from the summit to qualify. Summit references follow the format ASSOCIATION/REGION-NNN (e.g. W7W/NG-001, G/LD-001). Points per summit vary from 1 to 10 based on elevation.
